data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: CLAUDE.md suggested-change report emitted (read-only guard). Content covers: (1) sprint-drift-check.sh drift detection, (2) CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal with confidence-signal.md contract ref, (3) validation failure routing, (4) out-of-scope review routing with sprint-review-scope-check.sh, (5) REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED with replan-observability.md contract ref, (6) INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED non-interactive handling. Orchestrator/user must apply to CLAUDE.md manually.
